name: Continuity Sanitation Checklist
description: Create a compact sanitation and sterilization action list for degraded shelter conditions.
script:
topic = 'sanitation'
if 'topic' in inputs:
  topic = str(inputs['topic'])
checklist = [
  'Separate clean water, waste, and sharps zones.',
  'Document a disinfection method and contact time for shared tools.',
  'Review hand-washing, waste handling, and illness isolation routines.',
  'Confirm the next sanitation review window and owner.'
]
emit('built sanitation continuity checklist')
result = {
  'topic': topic,
  'summary': 'Sanitation continuity checklist prepared.',
  'checklist': checklist,
}
